title: Double Dragon Brown Packing Tape – 48mm x 66m (3 Rolls) | Heavy-Duty Parcel Packaging Tape for Secure Box Sealing | Ideal for Packing, Shipping, Moving, Storage, eCommerce | Carton & Postal Use
features: ✅ GENEROUS ROLL SIZE FOR MAXIMUM COVERAGE: Each roll measures 48mm in width and 66 metres in length, offering extended usage for high-volume packing needs without frequent replacements.
✅ STRONG ADHESIVE FOR A SECURE SEAL: Industrial-grade glue ensures a firm, reliable bond on cardboard, paper, and other surfaces. Prevents peeling, splitting, or accidental openings during transit.
✅ VERSATILE USE FOR HOME & BUSINESS: Perfect for sealing moving boxes, storage cartons, eCommerce parcels, warehouse packaging, and general office or household use.
✅ DURABLE & WEATHER-RESISTANT: Built to withstand fluctuating temperatures and humidity. Delivers consistent performance in storage units, during shipping, or in transit.
✅ TRUSTED QUALITY BY DOUBLE DRAGON: Backed by Double Dragon’s commitment to reliable packaging solutions, this tape delivers performance, value, and peace of mind in every roll.
